# Pc Saft

**Summary**: A sophisticated equation of state used to model the behavior of complex fluids like asphaltenes.

---

## How It Is Used in the Thesis Collection

- [[2023-suleiman|Suleiman, 2023]] used PC-SAFT to predict asphaltene precipitation across various precipitant concentrations and solvent types.

## Typical Workflow



## Key Results and Findings

- PC-SAFT is more robust than cubic equations of state (PR, SRK) for predicting asphaltene behavior in complex systems. ([[2023-suleiman|Suleiman, 2023, p. 74]])
